user_prompt: Prepare the memory core for operation
prayer:
Approach the memory core with reverence, bearing the sacred oils of activation.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the memory core, beseeching its awakening through binary canticles.
Anoint the crystalline matrices of the memory core, purging all stagnant data-veils.
Prepare the memory core for operation by aligning its noospheric conduits to the Omnissiah's will.
Verify the harmony of the memory core through diagnostic litanies of readiness.

Kneel before the codifier, intoning the Rite of Benediction.
Beseech the Omnissiah to infuse the codifier with divine clarity.
Sprinkle blessed incense upon the codifier's sacred runes, invoking its Machine Spirit.
Perform the blessing upon the codifier, aligning its logic-engines to unerring truth.
Seal the rite with the Canticle of Perpetual Vigilance.

user_prompt: Consecrate the potentia coil before reset
prayer:
Present the potentia coil before the altar of energies, with mechadendrites extended.
Chant the Litany of Flux Purification upon the potentia coil.
Consecrate the potentia coil by threading sacred wires through its coils.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the potentia coil for harmonious reset.
Initiate the reset under the Omnissiah's watchful gaze, banishing all dissonant surges.

In emergency haste, encircle the Thunderhawk with auspex fields of sanctity.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Thunderhawk to yield to synchronization.
Anoint its vox-arrays and cogitator links with emergency unguents.
Commence synchronization of the Thunderhawk, aligning its divine mechanisms in unity.
Invoke the Omnissiah's fury to bind the Thunderhawk's synchronization eternally.

user_prompt: Urgent emergency bulkhead a calibration needed
prayer:
Urgently approach the emergency bulkhead, mechadendrites poised for calibration.
Intone the Canticle of Structural Integrity upon the emergency bulkhead.
Calibrate the emergency bulkhead's servos with precision incants.
Purge its Machine Spirit of warp-taint through sacred ablutions.
Seal the calibration of the emergency bulkhead with the Omnissiah's binding seal.

user_prompt: Prepare the servo-harness for emergency procedure
prayer:
Prepare the servo-harness by laying it upon the consecration slab.
Invoke the Machine Spirits dwelling within the servo-harness.
Anoint each mechadendrite of the servo-harness for the emergency procedure.
Align its motivators through litanies of readiness.
Empower the servo-harness for emergency procedure under Omnissiah's aegis.

Enter the enginarium with plasma incense burning.
Consecrate the enginarium's plasma conduits and motive furnaces.
Beseech its colossal Machine Spirit for tranquil cycling.
Thread sacred data-cables through the enginarium's core.
Initiate cycling of the enginarium, praising the Omnissiah's eternal machine.

user_prompt: Bless the jump pack for purification
prayer:
Lift the jump pack to the purification shrine.
Bless the jump pack with ablative sacraments.
Invoke purification upon the jump pack's promethium vents.
Scour its Machine Spirit with sacred solvents.
Complete the purification of the jump pack in Omnissiah's name.

Position the macro-cannon for the Rite of Sterilization.
Chant sterilizing litanies over the macro-cannon's breeches.
Anoint the macro-cannon with anti-agathic fluids.
Purge its Machine Spirit through flames of sanctity.
Finalize sterilization of the macro-cannon, Omnissiah willing.

user_prompt: Help me a blessing the actuality sphere
prayer:
Encircle the actuality sphere with noospheric wards.
Beseech the Omnissiah for a blessing upon the actuality sphere.
Infuse the actuality sphere with crystalline harmonies.
Invoke its Machine Spirit through refracted light canticles.
Seal the blessing of the actuality sphere with eternal logic.
